description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open-plan layout and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and features a well-maintained garden with several mature trees and a central flowering shrub. A paved driveway leads to a covered carport on one side of the house, providing sheltered parking. The backyard and side yards are landscaped with grass and decorative plants, enhancing the suburban appeal. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and landscaped gardens surrounded by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and a central shrub.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large windows, and mature trees along the fence line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the continuation of the wooden fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
